Original Persona: A government official who often becomes the target of their blogs
Expanded Persona:
Benjamin Katz (born 1976) is a male Jewish government official who writes a widely read policy blog. They are a public servant by trade and often become the target of their blogs, drawing criticism as well as conversation. Across a 25-year career in government, they have focused on urban policy and regulatory affairs and are known for candid, evidence-driven commentary. Their posts frequently attract scrutiny and personal attacks, but they use the feedback to refine policy arguments and engage constituents. Born in 1976, they balance a demanding public role with family life in a mid-sized city and continue to publish regularly.
